arguments.argument: findTargetX=point_distance(oPlayer1.x,0,x,0) findTargetY=point_distance(0,oPlayer1.y,0,y) if findTargetX<drawRangeX and findTargetY<drawRangeY { draw_set_color(platColor) draw_set_alpha(0.3) draw_roundrect(x,y,x+image_xscale-1,y+image_yscale-1,0) draw_set_alpha(1) draw_roundrect(x,y,x+image_xscale-1,y+image_yscale-1,1) }
